'''zapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabbitbush|rabbitbush]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-p-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabbitbush|rabbitbush]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zapaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæpækæth|zæpækæth]] || [[word:zæpækæj|zæpækæj]] || [[word:zæpækæsh|zæpækæsh]] || [[word:zæpækæ|zæpækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zapapakath|zapapakath]] || [[word:zapapakaj|zapapakaj]] || [[word:zapapakash|zapapakash]] || [[word:zapapaka|zapapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zapakath|zapakath]] || [[word:zapakaj|zapakaj]] || [[word:zapakash|zapakash]] || [[word:zapaka|zapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zapafkath|zapafkath]] || [[word:zapafkaj|zapafkaj]] || [[word:zapafkash|zapafkash]] || [[word:zapafkaf|zapafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zapakatha|zapakatha]] || [[word:zapakaja|zapakaja]] || [[word:zapakasha|zapakasha]] || [[word:zapakaka|zapakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zapakath|zapakath]] || [[word:zapakaj|zapakaj]] || [[word:zapakash|zapakash]] || [[word:zapaka|zapaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zapakathal|zapakathal]] || [[word:zapakajal|zapakajal]] || [[word:zapakashal|zapakashal]] || [[word:zapakakal|zapakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zapakathatha|zapakathatha]] || [[word:zapakajaja|zapakajaja]] || [[word:zapakashasha|zapakashasha]] || [[word:zapakaka|zapakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zapakathan|zapakathan]] || [[word:zapakajan|zapakajan]] || [[word:zapakashan|zapakashan]] || [[word:zapakakan|zapakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zapakathaoro|zapakathaoro]] || [[word:zapakajaoro|zapakajaoro]] || [[word:zapakashaoro|zapakashaoro]] || [[word:zapakakaoro|zapakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
